message:
fix(bd-2do7): switch asupersync to crates.io 0.1.1 (remove broken local path)

The workspace path dependency ../asupersync contained unresolved merge
markers that broke cargo clippy. Switch to the published crate.

Co-Authored-By: NavyHawk (codex-cli/gpt-5-codex)
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -100,6 +100,8 @@ checksum = "03918c3dbd7701a85c6b9887732e2921175f26c350b4563841d0958c21d57e6d"
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
 version = "0.1.1"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "88eafdfdd913f7464e5329597771f95bb6fa6b0edb6e75ac8542de43c806f822"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode",
@@ -1279,15 +1281,6 @@ version = "2.7.6"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "f52b00d39961fc5b2736ea853c9cc86238e165017a493d1d5c8eac6bdc4cc273"
 
-[[package]]
-name = "memoffset"
-version = "0.9.1"
-source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "488016bfae457b036d996092f6cb448677611ce4449e970ceaf42695203f218a"
-dependencies = [
- "autocfg",
-]
-
 [[package]]
 name = "miniz_oxide"
 version = "0.8.9"
@@ -1320,7 +1313,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "cfg-if",
  "cfg_aliases",
  "libc",
- "memoffset",
 ]
 
 [[package]]

@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ readme = "README.md"
 
 [workspace.dependencies]
 # Runtime (our own)
-asupersync = { version = "0.1.0", path = "../asupersync" }
+asupersync = "0.1.1"
 rich_rust = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../rich_rust" }
 
 # Serialization (only these)
